title: Keto Filipino Pancit Stir Fry
description: A low-carb and keto-friendly twist on the classic Filipino noodle dish, made with sweet and savory flavors.

ingredients.name: canton glass noodles
ingredients.notes: substitute with zucchini noodles for keto version

ingredients.name: jelly-like oyster sauce
ingredients.notes: substitute with sugar-free oyster sauce for keto version

instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the chicken and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the pancit and glass noodles and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the oyster sauce and fish sauce (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
